resources.string: Trigger a test crash to verify crash report works
Automatically check for new versions on app launch
This is the latest version of the app
Connecting the USB charging cable ensures that the phone remains awake, thus avoiding any interception or restriction of its functions by the system.
Turn off battery optimization to keep the web access working when the screen is off.

When enabled, the persistent \"running\" notification is shown in your status bar. The web server and Cloudflare tunnel will keep running either way — this only controls whether you see the notification.
Keep web access always online (uses more battery). Turn this on if it stops working when your phone sleeps.
APP data is restored, you need to force quit this app and start the app again as new.

Welcome! You can easily send text, images, and videos to this page and view them on your computer.\nIf you encounter any issues, please feel free to send an email to support@plainapp.app for assistance or join our Discord discussion at: https://discord.gg/RQWcS6DEEe.
PlainApp is free, open-source, and built by one developer. If it saves you time, consider buying a coffee.
Drag the number to reorder the list

Removes PlainApp from the home screen and app drawer. The web panel and all background services keep working. Note: a few OEM launchers (Samsung One UI, MIUI, ColorOS, etc.) keep a cached \"ghost\" icon in the app drawer until the launcher is restarted — long-press the launcher in Settings > Apps and tap Force stop, or simply reboot the phone to clear it.
PlainApp requires its in-app PIN before you can deactivate Device Admin. Enter the PIN on the lock screen that just opened. Without the correct PIN you will be sent back to the home screen.
Confirm PIN to deactivate Device Admin
Enter your PlainApp PIN to allow Device Admin to be turned off. Without the correct PIN, this request will be cancelled.
Use biometrics to confirm Device Admin deactivation.
PlainApp Device Admin was deactivated without entering the in-app PIN. Re-enable it now to keep the keep-alive protection working.

Require the PlainApp PIN before any installed app\'s App info page can be viewed or edited (long-press on a launcher icon → App info, or Settings → Apps → any app). Needs the accessibility service to be enabled.
Confirm PIN to view App info
Enter your PlainApp PIN to view or edit this app\'s details. Without the correct PIN you will be sent back to the home screen.
Use biometrics to view this app\'s App info page.
Require a PIN (and optionally biometrics) before showing the app screens.
Use fingerprint or face when available. PIN is always available as fallback.
The app lock only protects the on-device screens. The web panel, Cloudflare tunnel and background services keep running.
Set a PIN before enabling the lock.
PIN must be at least 4 digits.
Clears the PIN and turns the lock off.
Disguise the home-screen icon, or upload your own.
Tap a theme to switch the home-screen icon and label. The launcher may take a few seconds to refresh; if you do not see the change, swipe to another home page and back.
Pick any image, give the shortcut a name, and pin it to your home screen. Android will use your image as the icon and your text as the label.

• Square images work best (1:1).
• Recommended size: 1024 × 1024 px or larger.
• PNG, JPG, or WebP.
• Keep the important content inside the centre 66 percent — the launcher may crop the outer edges into a circle, squircle, or rounded square.
• Solid or simple backgrounds look cleanest.
• The image is auto-cropped to a square, scaled to 432 × 432, and placed on a coloured background to make a perfect adaptive icon.
Prefer to do it from code?

A full guide is included in the project root: LAUNCHER_ICON_SETUP.md. It explains exactly which folder to drop your icon into, which line to edit for the app name, and how to add a brand-new icon theme.
Applied. The home-screen icon will refresh shortly.
Shortcut pinned to your home screen.
Your launcher does not support pinning shortcuts. Try a different launcher or use one of the built-in themes.
